subcodes.first_line: O friend! Hearken unto the Word of the Friend, and with thy soul give ear. Grievous indeed is it for the friend to be parted from the friend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست بشنو کلمه دوست را و بجان اصغا نما صعبست بر دوست مفارقت دوست
subcodes.subjects: @power of love, @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @attaining good pleasure of God, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @heat and motion
